initial_candidates.sql:
WITH avg_consumption_by_segment AS (
  SELECT 
    customers.Segment,
    AVG(yearmonth.Consumption) AS avg_consumption
  FROM 
    yearmonth
  JOIN 
    customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
  WHERE 
    yearmonth.Date LIKE '2013%'
  GROUP BY 
    customers.Segment
),
min_consumption_segment AS (
  SELECT 
    Segment
  FROM 
    avg_consumption_by_segment
  ORDER BY 
    avg_consumption ASC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_consumption_by_segment WHERE Segment = 'SME') - 
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_consumption_by_segment WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS SME_vs_LAM,
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_consumption_by_segment WHERE Segment = 'LAM') - 
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_consumption_by_segment WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS LAM_vs_KAM,
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_consumption_by_segment WHERE Segment = 'KAM') - 
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_consumption_by_segment WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS KAM_vs_SME
FROM 
  min_consumption_segment;

WITH avg_consumption_per_segment AS (
  SELECT 
    customers.Segment,
    AVG(yearmonth.Consumption) AS avg_consumption
  FROM 
    yearmonth
  JOIN 
    customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
  WHERE 
    yearmonth.Date LIKE '2013%'
  GROUP BY 
    customers.Segment
)
SELECT 
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_consumption_per_segment WHERE Segment = 'SME') - 
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_consumption_per_segment WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS SME_vs_LAM,
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_consumption_per_segment WHERE Segment = 'LAM') - 
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_consumption_per_segment WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS LAM_vs_KAM,
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_consumption_per_segment WHERE Segment = 'KAM') - 
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_consumption_per_segment WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS KAM_vs_SME

WITH avg_consumption_per_segment AS (
  SELECT 
    customers.Segment,
    AVG(yearmonth.Consumption) AS avg_consumption
  FROM 
    yearmonth
  JOIN 
    customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
  WHERE 
    yearmonth.Date LIKE '2013%'
  GROUP BY 
    customers.Segment
)
SELECT 
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_consumption_per_segment WHERE Segment = 'SME') - 
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_consumption_per_segment WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS SME_vs_LAM,
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_consumption_per_segment WHERE Segment = 'LAM') - 
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_consumption_per_segment WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS LAM_vs_KAM,
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_consumption_per_segment WHERE Segment = 'KAM') - 
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_consumption_per_segment WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS KAM_vs_SME

WITH avg_consumption_by_segment AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        AVG(ym.Consumption) AS avg_consumption
    FROM 
        yearmonth ym
    JOIN 
        customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE 
        ym.Date LIKE '2013%'
    GROUP BY 
        c.Segment
),
min_segment AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment
    FROM 
        avg_consumption_by_segment
    ORDER BY 
        avg_consumption ASC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_consumption_by_segment WHERE Segment = 'SME') - 
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_consumption_by_segment WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS SME_LAM_diff,
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_consumption_by_segment WHERE Segment = 'LAM') - 
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_consumption_by_segment WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS LAM_KAM_diff,
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_consumption_by_segment WHERE Segment = 'KAM') - 
    (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_consumption_by_segment WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS KAM_SME_diff;

SELECT 
  (SELECT AVG(Consumption) FROM yearmonth y JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID WHERE c.Segment = 'SME' AND y.Date LIKE '2013%') -
  (SELECT AVG(Consumption) FROM yearmonth y JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID WHERE c.Segment = 'LAM' AND y.Date LIKE '2013%') AS SME_LAM,
  
  (SELECT AVG(Consumption) FROM yearmonth y JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID WHERE c.Segment = 'LAM' AND y.Date LIKE '2013%') -
  (SELECT AVG(Consumption) FROM yearmonth y JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID WHERE c.Segment = 'KAM' AND y.Date LIKE '2013%') AS LAM_KAM,
  
  (SELECT AVG(Consumption) FROM yearmonth y JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID WHERE c.Segment = 'KAM' AND y.Date LIKE '2013%') -
  (SELECT AVG(Consumption) FROM yearmonth y JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID WHERE c.Segment = 'SME' AND y.Date LIKE '2013%') AS KAM_SME
